hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */packages/cli/*) cd "${f%%/packages/cli/*}/packages/cli" && cargo fmt && cargo clippy --quiet 2>&1 || true ;; esac; }
jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.res|*.resi) cd "${f%%/packages/envio/*}/packages/envio" && pnpx rescript@12.2.0 format "$f" || true ;; esac; }
